name: MediaGetPropertySize
title: MediaGetPropertySize
syntax: long MediaGetPropertySize(dword objHandle, char propertyName[], dword& width, dword& height);
description: Retrieves a property whose value is a size, expressed as a width and height. Properties can be retrieved on an object specific basis for a media type object (e.g. returned by MediaGetMediaType).

parameters.name: propertyName
parameters.description: Name of the property to be retrieved.
